intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

intervals.name: Sustained threshold ability
intervals.instruction: Hold 95-100% FTP for full duration. Steady power.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 100% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 30:00 at 100%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/2. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 30:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 30:00 at 100%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

intervals.name: Sustained threshold ability
intervals.instruction: Hold 95-100% FTP for full duration. Steady power.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 2/2. 57% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 100% × 20:00. Then 10min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 20:00 at 100%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 100% for 20:00. Then 10min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 100% × 20:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 60 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 85% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
